mapper.select: SELECT id, member_id, follow_notify, like_bookmark_notify, comment_mention_notify, auction_notify, payment_settlement_notify, contest_notify, pause_all, created_datetime, updated_datetime FROM tbl_notification_setting WHERE member_id = #{memberId}
mapper.update: UPDATE tbl_notification_setting SET follow_notify = #{followNotify}, like_bookmark_notify = #{likeBookmarkNotify}, comment_mention_notify = #{commentMentionNotify}, auction_notify = #{auctionNotify}, payment_settlement_notify = #{paymentSettlementNotify}, contest_notify = #{contestNotify}, pause_all = #{pauseAll}, updated_datetime = now() WHERE member_id = #{memberId}
